summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Odapto Kanban SaaS after session persistence fixes. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend core features functional, but session persistence remains broken despite localStorage implementation attempts.

ui_bugs.issue: Session persistence still broken - users get logged out on page refresh despite localStorage + Authorization header implementation

integration_issues.issue: Users can register and login successfully, but session doesn't persist across page reloads. Redirected to login page on refresh.

passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% pass rate - 11/11 endpoints)
User registration via UI with unique email generation
Landing page loads with Odapto branding and navigation
Workspace creation modal opens and form fills correctly
User-specific content display (Welcome back messages, user avatars)
API-based workspace, board, list, card operations

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (8/10 major features working, session persistence critical issue remains)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Session persistence issue persists. Users can successfully register and login, but get logged out on page refresh. The localStorage + Authorization header implementation is not working correctly. This blocks full testing of workspace creation, board functionality, and Kanban drag-drop features. Backend authentication is working perfectly - this is purely a frontend session management issue.
